name: Spinach Ball Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the spinach and potatoes until tender.
2. Drain, peel the potatoes, and grind them with the spinach using a food processor or blender.
3. Add chick pea flour to the mixture and blend well.
4. Stir in milk or cream, then add salt, turmeric, garam masala, green mango powder (omit if desired), and cayenne. Mix until you have a smooth dough.
5. Form small pieces into balls or shapes of your choice.
6. Heat sufficient ghee in a wok or deep skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Roll each ball in dried coconut and fry until golden brown, then remove to a plate.
8. In a pot, heat the gravy on medium heat.
9. Add the fried koftas to the gravy, cover, lower the heat, and cook for 10 minutes.
10. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve.
